  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation

Verwendungen von Schnittstelle
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.Mutation

Packages, die Mutation verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
Contains implementations of the Mutation operator for the Darwinian Engine.

  • Verwendungen von Mutation in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config

    Felder in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config, die deklariert sind als Mutation
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    Mutation<Character>
    CryptanalysisGAConfig.mutation
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation.
    Mutation<Integer>
    KnapsackGAConfig.mutation
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation.
    Mutation<Integer>
    SudokuGAConfig.mutation
     
    Mutation<SymRegNode>
    SymRegGAConfig.mutation
     
    Mutation<Integer>
    TSPGAConfig.mutation
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation in tours.

  • Verwendungen von Mutation in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

    Konstruktoren in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Parametern vom Typ Mutation
    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    GeneticAlgorithm(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, Selection<T> selection, Crossover<T> crossover, Mutation<T> mutation, FitnessFunction<T> fitnessFunction, double crossoverRate, double mutationRate)
    Creates a new genetic algorithm instance with the specified components.

  • Verwendungen von Mutation in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation

    Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation, die Mutation implementieren
    Modifikator und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    class 
    BitFlipMutation
    Description: Iterates through each gene in a binary sequence and tosses a coin based on the mutation rate.
    class 
    PointAndSubtreeMutation
    Description: A composite operator that randomly toggles (50/50 chance) between executing a delicate PointMutation (tweaking a single value) or a destructive SubtreeMutation (grafting a brand new random branch).
    class 
    PointMutation
    Description: Traverses an AST to pick a single node and perturbs it without altering the underlying tree structure.
    class 
    SimpleMutation<T>
    Description: Iterates over the genome and entirely replaces genes with random values fetched from a predefined range.
    class 
    SubtreeMutation
    Description: Randomly selects a node within a tree and completely replaces it (and its children) with a brand new, randomly generated subtree.
    class 
    SudokuHybridMutation
    Description: A dual-action operator that randomly picks a single 3x3 block and decides whether to cleanly swap two non-fixed cells or aggressively replace a non-fixed cell with a random number (1-9).
    class 
    SudokuSwapMutation
    Description: Targets a random 3x3 block and swaps two non-fixed cells within it.
    class 
    SwapMutation<T>
    Description: Randomly picks two unique gene indices across the chromosome sequence and swaps their contents.
    class 
    UniformMutation<T>
    Description: Iterates through each gene in the chromosome.
